_comment: Valid 'type' values: talk, press, award, panel, podcast, organizing. Paste new entries to Claude in chat and they'll be added here — 'scientist' should match a name in team.json exactly, or use 'ELLIS Institute Tübingen' for institute-level items not tied to one person.
